title: External Agent Write API — Modification Event Payload (v1.0)
description: Payload shape for envelope.event_type='modification'. Routes to vehicle_observations with observation_kind='work_record', source slug 'agent-submission'. Use when the work changes the vehicle's spec away from factory: engine swap, lift, brake upgrade, rewire, paint change. Distinct from 'service' (maintenance restoring factory function) so build provenance can be filtered.

summary.description: 1–2 sentence headline of the modification (e.g. 'Swapped Edelbrock RPM intake for stock cast iron').

narrative.description: Free-form long-form description, including motivation and outcome.

modification_type.description: Coarse category of the modification. Drives downstream classifiers (e.g. valuation impact, originality scoring).

zones_modified.description: Subsystems physically changed by this modification.

reversibility.description: How easily this modification can be undone. Affects originality scoring.

from_spec.description: What the vehicle had before this modification (free-form, e.g. 'stock 305 SBC, factory carburetor').

to_spec.description: What the vehicle has after this modification.

parts.description: Parts installed (or removed and retained) as part of the modification.

labor_minutes.description: Wrench time consumed performing the modification.

photos_referenced.description: Caller-side identifiers of photos that document the change (before/after preferred).
